description_long: This object resembles a stylized, fantasy-themed knife or sword with a bird-like motif. The blade is represented by elongated, claw-like extensions at the end of each arm, appearing sharp and metallic. The central body is rounded and robust, with a cream and orange color palette, and features feather-like protrusions and a tail, enhancing its avian appearance. The handle area is integrated into the lower body, with the legs and feet forming a stable base, and the claws suggesting a gripping or slashing function. The surface appears matte and smooth, with no visible engravings or ornamentation. The overall design is whimsical and character-inspired, rather than strictly utilitarian.
description: A stylized, bird-themed knife or sword with claw-like blades and a rounded, feathered body in cream and orange tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full bird-like face, chest, and both clawed blades extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beak, tail, and the length of the left claw-blade.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail, back feathers, and the symmetrical placement of the claw-blades.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the right claw-blade and tail profile.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, rounded, smooth, no visible grip texture
